Request a demo

Asset Management

Everything you own. Tracked from day one.

Spreadsheets and shared drives are not an asset management system. SYAG gives facility administrators a structured registry for every physical security asset — with lifecycle tracking, assignment history, and maintenance alerts built in.

One register for everything in your facility

Every physical asset in your facility has a record in SYAG: serial number, purchase date, warranty status, assigned location, current custodian, and full event history.

Asset types you can track

  • Security cameras and recording equipment
  • Guard equipment (body cameras, torches, radios, vehicles)
  • Access control hardware (card readers, barriers, turnstiles)
  • Safety equipment (fire extinguishers, AEDs, first aid kits)
  • Facility infrastructure (generators, UPS systems, transformers)
  • IT equipment (servers, networking hardware, intercoms)

Custom asset types: Define your own asset categories with custom attributes.

From purchase to retirement — nothing gets lost

Procurement

Record purchase date, supplier, warranty, and cost

Deployment

Assign to a site, zone, or individual guard

Maintenance

Log servicing events, schedule future maintenance, receive alerts when due

Incidents

Link incidents to assets ("this camera triggered this event")

Retirement

Decommission with reason and disposal record

Proactive maintenance. Not reactive repairs.

  • Configure maintenance schedules per asset type (annual, quarterly, monthly)
  • Receive alerts when maintenance is due — in-app, email, or SMS
  • Log completed maintenance with technician notes and attachments
  • Track maintenance history per asset over its full lifetime
  • Overdue maintenance flagged on the asset dashboard

Always know who has what

Assign assets to guards, sites, or zones. Track check-out and check-in.

  • Guard equipment check-out log
  • Unassigned asset alerts — flag equipment that hasn't been checked out for a shift
  • Transfer history — track when assets move between sites or custodians

See SYAG Asset Management in action.
